settings.title: Settings
settings.thresholdSub: Weekly % needed to keep your Mon healthy
settings.rolloverSub: When tasks expire and habits reset. Pick later if you work nights.
settings.rolloverMidnight: Your day rolls over at midnight.
settings.rolloverHour: Your day rolls over at {{hour}}. Anything before that still counts as the previous day.
settings.devSimulateSub: wait up to 60s for hatch to trigger

illDialog.title: Mon is not feeling well
illDialog.message: This week's completion fell below your threshold. Keep completing habits and tasks to nurse Mon back to health — or lower the weekly threshold in Settings if the bar feels too high.

setup.intro: Before we start, set up a couple of preferences so your Mon knows when your week begins and ends.
setup.rolloverMidnight: Your day rolls over at midnight.
setup.rolloverHour: Your day rolls over at {{hour}}. Anything before that still counts as the previous day.

onboarding.title: HOW IT WORKS
onboarding.intro: There are three types of items. Each one affects Mon differently.
onboarding.habitsDesc: Recurring goals you want to hit a set number of times per week — "run 3×", "meditate daily". They make up Mon's weekly health score. Fall short of your threshold and Mon gets sick.
onboarding.tasksDesc: Daily commitments. Anything left incomplete when the day resets counts against Mon's health. Only add things you genuinely intend to finish today.
onboarding.pantryDesc: A no-pressure holding area for things on your radar. Activate an item when you're ready to own it — it becomes a Task for the day. You have 3 hours to change your mind and return it to the Pantry. After that, it stays as a Task.

app.resetMessage: This will clear all habits, tasks, pantry items, and calendar history. Your Mon will go back to an egg.
